name: On-Care Stew for Dogs
description: When dogs are diagnosed with a serious illness, ensuring their nutritional needs are met is critical. Prescription Diet ON-Care is designed to help maintain strength and energy as well as encourage eating from the very first bowl. Please contact your vet to see if this is the right food for your dog. Hill's nutritionists and veterinarians developed the nutrition of Hill's Prescription Diet ON-Care to specifically help nourish and support dogs fighting serious illness. This delicious wet food is made with chicken, flavourful fats and highly digestible protein, to give your dog a great mealtime
